<!--
Thanks for contributing to @gridmason/sdk! Please keep PRs small and focused.
First-time contributors: a bot will ask you to sign the CLA on this PR — reply
with the exact sentence it gives you. PRs cannot merge until the CLA is signed.
-->

## What

<!-- What does this change do? -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation / issue this addresses. Link the issue: e.g. "Refs #123". -->

## Contract impact

<!--
Which HostSDK interface members, helpers, or capabilities are affected? Is this
additive (minor) or breaking (major)? "None — internal only" is a valid answer.
-->

## How tested

<!-- What did you run/observe? Include negative cases for capability, scoping,
identity, or unmount changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npm test && npm run lint && npm run typecheck` all pass.
- [ ] Tests added/updated (including negative cases where relevant).
- [ ] Conformance kit + tests updated if a SPEC §3 contract rule changed.
- [ ] A changeset is included if this is user-facing (`npx changeset`).
- [ ] The CLA is signed (the bot will guide you on your first PR).
